Interface ActionConstructor

public interface ActionConstructor
Interface for creating actions in the client. Each action can be constructed with a set of arguments.

  • Field Summary

    Fields
    Modifier and Type
    Field
    Description
    static final Map<String,ActionConstructor>
    actionConstructors
    A static map that holds action constructors for various actions.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    Action
    create(Map<String,String> args)
    Creates an action based on the provided arguments.
    static ActionConstructor
    getActionConstructor(String action)
    Retrieves an ActionConstructor by its action name.
    static Map<String,ActionConstructor>
    getActionConstructors()
    Returns a map of action constructors, initializing it if it is empty.
    default List<String>
    getArguments()
    Returns a list of argument names required to create the action.

  • Field Details

    • actionConstructors

      static final Map<String,ActionConstructor> actionConstructors
      A static map that holds action constructors for various actions. This map is initialized lazily to avoid unnecessary memory usage.

  • Method Details

    • create

      Action create(Map<String,String> args) throws IllegalArgumentException
      Creates an action based on the provided arguments.
      Parameters:
      args - A map of arguments required to create the action.
      Returns:
      An instance of Action that can be executed in the client state.
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if the arguments are invalid for the action.

    • getArguments

      default List<String> getArguments()
      Returns a list of argument names required to create the action. This is used for generating user interfaces or documentation.
      Returns:
      A list of argument names, or null if the action does not require arguments.

    • getActionConstructors

      static Map<String,ActionConstructor> getActionConstructors()
      Returns a map of action constructors, initializing it if it is empty. This method is used to retrieve the available actions and their constructors.
      Returns:
      A map where keys are action names and values are ActionConstructor instances.

    • getActionConstructor

      static ActionConstructor getActionConstructor(String action)
      Retrieves an ActionConstructor by its action name. This method is used to find the constructor for a specific action.
      Parameters:
      action - The name of the action for which to retrieve the constructor.
      Returns:
      An ActionConstructor instance corresponding to the action, or null if not found.
